title: Jordanians Struggle as Mideast Wars Scare Tourists Away
summary_full: Though Jordan mostly sat out the conflicts, its tourism high season was nearly wiped out at popular sites. Visitors canceled flights, hotels and tours.
summary_public: Though Jordan mostly sat out the conflicts, its tourism high season was nearly wiped out at popular sites. Visitors canceled flights, hotels and tours.

JO.label: negative
JO.evidence: Jordanians Struggle as Mideast Wars Scare Tourists Away
